rationale: The citing paper references Pham and Muthukrishnan (2002) at a specific inferential step, using it to justify the interpretation of mediation via reduction in mean squares of the focal interaction after adding attribution covariates. This is more than a generic background mention because it directly supports how the authors analyze and interpret their Study 1 results. The citation is methodological in function rather than a conceptual foundation for the self-awareness theory.
relation_description: The citing paper applies a mediation-assessment approach referenced from the cited paper, specifically using attenuation in interaction mean squares after including mediator terms. The cited work serves as methodological precedent for this analytic interpretation.
